name: Successful purchase of two products

testSteps.description: Given that a standard user logs into SauceDemo

children.description: Customer opens the browser at https://www.saucedemo.com/

rootCause.message:

testSteps.description: When the user adds two products to the cart
And navigates to the cart to checkout
And fills out the checkout form with personal data
Then the user should see the exact confirmation message "THANK YOU FOR YOUR ORDER"

userStory.narrative:
As a standard user
  I want to add products to my cart and complete the checkout process
  So that I can successfully purchase items

title: Successful purchase of two products
